title: VLA Tutorial: Building Your First Policy
summary: A practical walkthrough from dataset schema to action-token decoding for a minimal VLA pipeline.
body: We cover data normalization, prompt templates, and low-latency decoder setup.
The tutorial includes baseline evaluation scripts and debugging checkpoints.
By the end, you can train and evaluate a compact policy on a small robot task set.
figureAlt: VLA Tutorial: Building Your First Policy figure
